meta.title: A new Data Engineering Professional Certificate is joining our catalog!
meta.description:
Pre-enroll now: https://bit.ly/3A6jQEp

Announcing Data Engineering, a new advanced professional certificate offered through Coursera, now available for pre-enrollment!
You can’t have good data analysis without data that is effectively ingested, stored, transformed, and served to meet the needs of downstream data stakeholders such as data scientists and machine learning engineers.

Data engineering is the foundation that makes data useful in modern organizations, as it involves the development, implementation, and maintenance of systems that transform raw data into high-quality information for analysis and machine learning use cases. It intersects with several undercurrents, such as security, data management, DataOps, data architecture, orchestration, and software engineering.

This 4-course program will help you think, act, and function like a data engineer in the real world as you develop core skills to select the right technologies for your data architecture and pipelines. You'll learn about the entire data engineering lifecycle, from data generation to ingestion, transformation, storage, and serving. 

These fundamental practices will allow you to tackle any data engineering problem systematically and grow your career in a high-demand field.

For aspiring data engineers, data engineers looking to refine their skills, and data stakeholders such as data team leads, the lessons in this specialization emphasize hands-on practice with cloud solutions, primarily AWS, and open source tools.

Taught by industry expert Joe Reis, co-author of the best-selling book “Fundamentals of Data Engineering,” this professional certificate equips you with the skills and knowledge to excel in a high-demand field. 

Pre-enroll now and get a 14-day free trial when the course launches, plus, be the first to know when it’s live!

Learn more: https://bit.ly/3A6jQEp
